title: Junior Business Development Manager at MagicBricks

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at MagicBricks
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? MagicBricks in Kochi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MagicBricks:
MagicBricks is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks!
